title: Age Category Classifier
description:
Implement functions that classify ages and determine age-based rules using if/elif/else logic.

1. `classify_age(age)` — Returns the category string:
   - 0-12: "child"
   - 13-19: "teen"
   - 20-64: "adult"
   - 65+: "senior"
2. `can_vote(age)` — Returns True if age >= 18, False otherwise
3. `ticket_price(age)` — Returns the ticket price as a float:
   - child (0-12): 5.00
   - teen (13-19): 8.00
   - adult (20-64): 12.00
   - senior (65+): 8.00
4. `life_stage(age)` — Returns a more detailed life stage string:
   - 0-2: "infant", 3-5: "toddler", 6-12: "child", 13-17: "adolescent",
   - 18-24: "young adult", 25-64: "adult", 65+: "senior"

Examples:
  classify_age(10) → "child"
  can_vote(18) → True
  ticket_price(30) → 12.00
  life_stage(4) → "toddler"
